decks.notes: The key concept of this deck is to quickly assemble and cast the card Doomsday, allowing the player to manipulate their library and win the game with Thassa's Oracle. The deck includes various ways to quickly generate mana, protect the combo with counterspells like Force of Will and Daze, and set up the combo with cards like Ponder and Brainstorm. The inclusion of cards like Mishra's Bauble and Edge of Autumn help with deck manipulation and acceleration, while The Fantasticar can provide additional card draw and filtering.

The deck focuses on generating fast mana with cards like Lotus Petal and Dark Ritual to cast spells like Burning Wish and Tendrils of Agony to win the game in a single turn. The deck also utilizes cards like Chrome Mox and Mox Opal to further accelerate mana production. It includes graveyard recursion with cards like Echo of Eons and Gaea's Will to refill the hand and continue the combo. Beseech the Mirror allows for searching key combo pieces, while Veil of Summer protects against disruption. Overall, the deck aims to quickly assemble the pieces needed for a storm combo finish.

This deck revolves around a powerful combo using The Fantasticar and various cards like Saprazzan Skerry to generate mana and draw cards. By using cards like Narset, Parter of Veils and Hullbreacher to disrupt the opponent's game plan, the deck aims to quickly assemble its combo pieces and overwhelm the opponent with card advantage and explosive plays. With powerful mana acceleration and disruptive elements like Force of Will, the deck is designed to quickly establish control of the game and win through its powerful combo synergy.

The main concept of this UWx Control deck is to disrupt the opponent's game plan through counterspells, removal spells, and disruptive creatures, while also maintaining card advantage through card draw and filtering effects. The deck aims to control the pace of the game and slowly grind out the opponent by answering threats efficiently and generating incremental advantages. Additionally, the deck includes some powerful planeswalkers like Teferi, Time Raveler and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student to provide additional value and card advantage. The mana base features important lands like Wasteland and Karakas to disrupt the opponent's mana base and key threats.

This Bant Control deck focuses on using a combination of removal spells, counter spells, and card draw to control the game and disrupt the opponent's strategy. It also features powerful creatures like Uro, Titan of Nature's Wrath and Murktide Regent to provide additional threats. The deck includes a diverse land base to support its three-color mana requirements, along with key lands like Karakas and Wasteland to disrupt the opponent's board. Overall, the deck aims to out-value and out-control its opponent to secure victory in the Legacy format.

The key concept of this deck is to utilize powerful combo pieces like Quantum Riddler and The Fantasticar to quickly generate advantage and disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck focuses on setting up explosive plays through cards like Dark Ritual and Lotus Petal, while also packing disruptive spells like Thoughtseize and Force of Will to protect its combo pieces. By combining card draw, fast mana, and versatile removal, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents with its powerful combo potential and manipulation of the game state.

The deck revolves around the combo of using The Fantasticar to cast Doomsday and win the game. It utilizes fast mana in the form of Lotus Petal and Dark Ritual to power out the combo quickly. The deck also includes various cantrips and disruptive spells to help find the combo pieces and protect them from opposing interaction. The addition of Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student provides card advantage and potential synergy with the combo pieces. Overall, the key strategy is to quickly assemble the combo and win before the opponent can disrupt it.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize a combination of fast mana acceleration cards such as Lion's Eye Diamond, Dark Ritual, and Lotus Petal, along with powerful combo pieces like Burning Wish and Hexing Squelcher to quickly assemble a game-winning combo. The inclusion of cards like Echo of Eons, Beseech the Mirror, and Song of Creation allows for card advantage and additional ways to find key pieces. The deck aims to generate a storm count for Tendrils of Agony or use The Fantasticar to overwhelm opponents with a flurry of spells and abilities.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize the powerful synergies between artifacts and cost reduction effects to quickly assemble the combo pieces necessary to win the game. Emry, Lurker of the Loch serves as a versatile engine for recurring key artifacts, while cards like Thoughtcast and Mishra's Bauble help to draw through the deck efficiently. The Fantasticar acts as a central piece in the combo, enabling explosive plays and providing a win condition. With a mix of card advantage, disruption, and fast mana acceleration, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with its consistent and powerful plays.

The deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with powerful creatures like Atraxa, Grand Unifier and Archon of Cruelty, then using spells like Reanimate and Animate Dead to bring them back onto the battlefield for a game-winning combo. The deck also includes disruptive cards like Thoughtseize and Force of Will to protect the combo and disrupt the opponent's game plan. The key strategy is to efficiently reanimate powerful threats while controlling the game with disruptive spells, ultimately overwhelming the opponent with a powerful and synergistic combo.

This deck focuses on assembling a powerful combo using cards like Grim Monolith, Mystic Forge, and The Fantasticar to generate mana and access powerful abilities. It also utilizes mana denial strategies with cards like Trinisphere and Chalice of the Void to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The goal is to establish a strong board presence and overwhelm the opponent with powerful spells and abilities. The deck's synergies and resource management are key to achieving victory in Legacy 1 vs 1 format.

The main focus of this deck is to control the opponent's actions and disrupt their game plan with counterspells, removal spells, and card draw. By utilizing cards like Force of Will, Swords to Plowshares, and Daze, the player aims to maintain board control and stop threats from resolving. Additionally, cards like Brainstorm and Ponder help the player to find the necessary cards they need while Quantum Riddler and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student provide additional card advantage. Teferi, Time Raveler acts as a powerful planeswalker to further disrupt the opponent's strategy. Overall, the goal is to outlast the opponent and outvalue them in the long game.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly assemble the pieces needed to combo off with The Fantasticar, a key card that can generate a lot of value once it hits the battlefield. The deck includes a lot of efficient cards that can help dig for combo pieces, disrupt the opponent's game plan, and protect the combo from being disrupted. The deck also includes alternative win conditions in Murktide Regent and Flow State, providing flexibility in strategy depending on the matchup. Overall, the deck aims to execute its combo efficiently and effectively to secure victory.

This deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while applying pressure with efficient creatures and spells. The focus is on controlling the board with cards like Thoughtseize, Fatal Push, and Force of Will, while advancing its game plan with tempo plays like Daze and Murktide Regent. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student provides card advantage and flexibility, while Orcish Bowmasters and Nethergoyf serve as threats that can quickly close out the game. The deck relies on a mix of disruption, card filtering, and efficient threats to outmaneuver opponents and secure victories.

The deck revolves around assembling the Dark Depths combo using Thespian's Stage to copy Dark Depths and create a 20/20 Marit Lage token. The deck utilizes cards like Crop Rotation, Green Sun's Zenith, and Knight of the Reliquary to tutor for the combo pieces quickly. Mox Diamond and Once Upon a Time provide mana acceleration and card selection, while Swords to Plowshares offers removal. The deck also includes utility lands like Karakas and Bojuka Bog for interaction with the opponent. The focus is on quickly assembling the combo and overwhelming the opponent with a powerful threat.

This UWx Control deck focuses on disrupting opponents' strategies with counterspells like Force of Will and Stifle, while also utilizing removal spells like Swords to Plowshares and Prismatic Ending. The deck aims to control the game through card advantage provided by cards like Brainstorm and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student. Teferi, Time Raveler helps in protecting key cards and disrupting opponents, while Quantum Riddler and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd provide additional value and threats on the board. The mana base is designed to support the deck's control elements and ensure consistency in casting spells.
